stem: Two very famous sportsmen Mark and Steve happened to be brothers and played for country A. Mark teased James, an opponent from country B: "There is no way you are good enough to play for your country." James replied, "Maybe not, but at least I am the best player in my own family." Which one of the following can be inferred from this conversation?

options.text: Mark was not as good as Steve
Steve was not as good as Mark
James and Steve were great friends

reason: Stem was truncated mid-sentence; options A and B were mangled — option A contained 'Mark teased James, an opponent from country' and option B contained a large chunk of source text including embedded answer choices. Corrected stem and options to match sourceQuestion faithfully.
